svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="45-gTDuFvh9qgjPMQVee" name="第 1 页"> <mxGraphModel dx="-534" dy="-264" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1020" pageHeight="1040" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="Communicator Initialization Flow (TileXRCommInitRank)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="940" x="40" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="TileXRGetUniqueId (root) 
→ broadcast unique id to all ranks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="320" x="240" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="TileXRCommInitRank(rank, nRanks, uniqueId)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="320" x="240" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Allocate shared IPC buffers
(~204 MB data + 4 MB flag space)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="320" x="240" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Socket exchange of peer info
(tools/socket/sock_exchange)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="320" x="240" y="306" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Enable peer memory access
→ populate CommArgs::peerMems[]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="320" x="240" y="386" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Upload CommArgs to device HBM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="320" x="240" y="472" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="UDMA available?
(multi-rank: HCCP / RA init)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="240" y="552" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uset" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffe6e6;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Set ExtraFlag::UDMA
udmaInfoPtr + udmaRegistryPtr" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="300" x="660" y="565" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="TILEXR_ENABLE_SDMA=1
and PTO SDMA usable?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="240" y="692" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sset" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f0e6f6;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Set ExtraFlag::SDMA
sdmaWorkspacePtr" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="300" x="660" y="705" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Record topology / capability flags
in CommArgs::extraFlag" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="320" x="240" y="832" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Communicator ready
kernels read via TileXRGetCommArgsDev" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="320" x="240" y="918" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ea" edge="1" parent="1" source="n1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#333333;" target="n2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eb" edge="1" parent="1" source="n2"
